{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Reigan Shen’s Remnant
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen’s Remnant]] is a [[Remnant]] that tried to cry but had no tears.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33">''Waybound'', chapter 33</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Remnants]]
